question:
What is the primary ethical danger of algorithmic bias in artificial intelligence?
A) It makes the AI operate too slowly to be useful.
B) It causes the AI to become self-aware and hostile to humans.
C) It can automate and scale historical discrimination, leading to unfair treatment of marginalized groups.
D) It forces the AI to only output responses in a single language.
